overall.description: Gameplay footage from Ghost of Tsushima showing a samurai character exiting a traditional Japanese house into a misty bamboo forest with a hot spring. The character explores the area briefly before continuing down a forest path as morning light filters through the fog.

scene_state.functional_zone: traditional Japanese house interior with paper screens

events.description: approaching the bright exit doorway, transitioning from dim interior to bright exterior light

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the dark wooden interior of the house toward the exit doorway

entered.detail: polished wooden floorboards of the traditional house interior
traditional Japanese paper screen doors with wooden frames
lit candle providing warm orange light in the dark interior
thick wooden support beam of the house structure
open doorway leading to the bright exterior bamboo forest

segments.scene_description: The segment opens inside a dimly lit traditional Japanese house with wooden floors and paper screen doors. Candlelight provides the only illumination as the samurai character walks toward a bright exit doorway, creating a strong contrast between the dark interior and the misty forest visible outside.

scene_state.functional_zone: misty hot spring area with wooden structures

events.description: exits the dark building into the bright, foggy bamboo forest with hot spring
character turns around and begins walking back toward the wooden gate

agents.ego_description: walking around the hot spring area to observe the surroundings, then turning back toward the entrance gate

entered.detail: earthen path leading through the forest
dense bamboo forest surrounding the clearing
steaming natural hot spring with milky blue water
thick mist rising from the hot spring surface
traditional wooden bath house structure adjacent to the spring
traditional Japanese gate marking the entrance to the sacred area
rustic wooden fence lining the path

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the dark house into a bright, misty clearing containing a steaming hot spring surrounded by bamboo. The camera explores the area, showing the wooden bath house and a torii gate, before the character turns around and walks back toward the forest path.

scene_state.functional_zone: bamboo forest trail with wooden gates

events.description: character turns left and walks through a wooden gate structure

agents.ego_description: walking along the winding dirt path through the dense bamboo forest, passing through wooden gates

entered.detail: large moss-covered boulder beside the path
thick morning fog permeating the bamboo forest

segments.scene_description: Leaving the hot spring behind, the character walks deeper into the bamboo forest along a dirt path. The camera passes through wooden gates as the bamboo stalks tower overhead, creating a canopy that filters the morning light. Large rocks and thick mist line the path as the forest becomes denser.

events.description: location text 'HIDDEN SPRINGS FOREST' appears on screen

agents.ego_description: continuing to walk steadily along the forest path as the bamboo forest opens into a wider area

entered.detail: game interface text identifying the area as Hidden Springs Forest
scattered boulders among the bamboo stalks

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking through the heart of the bamboo forest as the location name 'Hidden Springs Forest' appears on screen. The path winds through towering bamboo stalks with mist drifting between them, and scattered rocks become visible along the trail as the forest opens into a wider, more expansive area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the dim interior of a traditional Japanese house into the expansive, mist-shrouded depths of a bamboo forest. It begins in a dark room illuminated by candlelight, moving toward a bright doorway that reveals a stark contrast between the wooden interior and the hazy outdoors. As the character emerges, the scene opens into a bright clearing featuring a steaming hot spring, a wooden bath house, and a torii gate, before the camera turns away to follow the path back into the woods. The view then shifts deeper into the forest, passing through wooden gates where towering bamboo stalks create a canopy that filters the morning light through thick mist and rocky terrain. Finally, the path winds through the heart of the Hidden Springs Forest, moving past drifting fog and scattered stones as the environment opens into a wider, more expansive woodland area.
